testimonials.heading: Trusted by Visionaries
testimonials.subheading: Real stories from founders and institution leaders who chose AppVerteX for their digital transformation.

items.name: Rajan Kamath
items.text: AppVerteX transformed our online presence. The site they built was fast, beautiful, and our sales jumped within the first week. Absolutely worth every rupee.

items.name: Sr. Priya D'Souza
items.text: We needed a school website urgently and AppVerteX delivered in record time. Parents love it, teachers love it — clean, easy to update, and incredibly professional.

items.name: Aryan Mehta
items.text: Leston and Lenstar are a powerhouse duo. They understood our vision instantly and built a landing page that gets us leads every single day. Highly recommend!
